name: mce-tools-monorepo
description: Main Character Energy Tools - Unified monorepo for OE Toolkit and all tools

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:oe-toolkit" "npm run dev:acc-extractor" "npm run dev:solar-analyzer"
scripts.dev:oe-toolkit: cd tools/oe-toolkit && pnpm install && pnpm dev
scripts.dev:acc-extractor: cd tools/acc-asset-extractor/webapp && pnpm install && pnpm dev --port 3001
scripts.build: npm run build:oe-toolkit && npm run build:acc-extractor && npm run build:solar-analyzer
scripts.build:oe-toolkit: cd tools/oe-toolkit && pnpm install && pnpm build
scripts.build:acc-extractor: cd tools/acc-asset-extractor/webapp && pnpm install && pnpm build
scripts.install-all: cd tools/oe-toolkit && pnpm install && cd ../../tools/acc-asset-extractor/webapp && pnpm install && cd ../../../../tools/performance-assessment/solar-analyzer && pnpm install
